headline: Super Micro Computer Expands Silicon Valley AI Campus As Valuation Draws Attention
summary: Super Micro Computer (NasdaqGS:SMCI) is expanding its Silicon Valley presence with its largest advanced data center campus near its San Jose headquarters. The new facility is designed around Supermicro's Data Center Building Block Solutions to support AI infrastructure for enterprises and cloud providers. The expansion is expected to create hundreds of jobs and increase U.S. based manufacturing and design capacity for high performance computing and AI servers. Supermicro focuses on high...

headline: SMCX Could Go Parabolic Again if the AI Server Boom Still Has Another Leg
summary: The math of a 2x daily reset leveraged ETF is unforgiving in a way that takes most investors a few painful months to fully appreciate. Defiance Daily Target 2X Long SMCI ETF (NASDAQ:SMCX) trades around $12 today after falling 8% in a single session, a reminder that this thing can move violently in either direction. ... SMCX Could Go Parabolic Again if the AI Server Boom Still Has Another Leg

headline: Dear Super Micro Computer Stock Fans, Mark Your Calendars for May 26
summary: Super Micro is still posting explosive top‑line growth and big EPS gains, but the DOJ export‑scheme indictment, a lost Oracle order, and excess Nvidia GPU inventory for xAI have turned it from a pure AI winner into an overhang‑heavy story trading at a discount multiple.

raw.headline: Dear Super Micro Computer Stock Fans, Mark Your Calendars for May 26
raw.summary: Super Micro is still posting explosive top‑line growth and big EPS gains, but the DOJ export‑scheme indictment, a lost Oracle order, and excess Nvidia GPU inventory for xAI have turned it from a pure AI winner into an overhang‑heavy story trading at a discount multiple.

headline: Supermicro Expands Data Center Building Block Solutions® Flexibility with Arm-Based Platforms and OCP Systems for Next-Gen AI Infrastructure
summary: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI), an AI, Enterprise, Storage, 5G/Edge Total Solution provider, today expanded its Data Center Building Block Solutions (DCBBS) portfolio with new Arm®-based server platforms powered by the new Arm AGI CPU, and new Open Compute Project (OCP) ORv3-compliant rack offerings. Supermicro leads the industry with over 20 OCP Inspired™ systems, which incorporate various OCP technologies and form factors, to simplify open data center deployments.
